TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sudan ((Faylo:Sudan highlighted.svg|thumb|Sudan in dark green, disputed regions in light green.)) Itini i 15 00 N, 30 00 E, noAfilika ko Sudan. Polong no sekalay i 1,861,484 sq km "saka 16 ko rayray no ngangan. " Polong i 36,729,501 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 100%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 0%, malo no roma to a sera 0%. siyoto O (((Khartoum)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakacecay 1 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Omar al-Bashir, patirengan a romi'ad i 1993 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 16 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA 外交部
S.PHON: so~u~uɬ~ɮan ((fajɾo~u:so~u~uɬ~ɮan ħi*ħɾi*ħtəɬ~ɮ.sb~v*|tħo~u~umb~b~v|so~u~uɬ~ɮan in ɬ~ɮark *rəən, ɬ~ɮispo~u~utəɬ~ɮ rə*io~uns in ɾi*ħt *rəən.)) itini i ** ** n, ** ** ə, no~uafiɾika ko~u so~u~uɬ~ɮan. po~uɾo~uŋ no~u səkaɾaj i *,***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŋaŋan. " po~uɾo~uŋ i **,***,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. səra masakiɾaʦ ko~u səra o~u maɾo~u kakao~umaħən a səra ***%, maɾo~u no~u kiɾakiɾaŋan a səra *%, maɾo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a səra *%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((kħarto~uo~u~um)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umirəŋan no~u kitakit a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ piħiratəŋan no~u kitakit a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i sakaʦəʦaj * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit anini i ʦi o~umar aɾ-b~b~vasħir, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw ʦia ***
S.FORM: Sudan ((Faylo:Sudan highlighted.svg|thumb|Sudan in dark green, disputed regions in light green.)) Itini i 15 00 N, 30 00 E, noAfilika ko Sudan. Polong no sekalay i 1,861,484 sq km "saka 16 ko rayray no ngangan. " Polong i 36,729,501 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 100%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 0%, malo no roma to a sera 0%. siyoto O (((Khartoum)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakacecay 1 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Omar al-Bashir, patirengan a romi'ad i 1993 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 16 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA 外交部
